title: Stashing Changes Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git's stashing mechanism.

questions.question: What is 'Stashing' in the context of Git?
options: A data error in a database
Temporarily storing uncommitted changes so you can switch tasks
A commit that is too large

questions.question: Which command is used to see a list of all your active Git stashes?
Regarding stashing, what is a key difference between 'apply' and 'pop'?
options: 'apply' leaves the stash in the list; 'pop' removes it after applying
Both apply and pop are only used in SQL
